'''mawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:irreproachably|irreproachably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:irreproachably|irreproachably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:mawate|mawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mawatesher|mawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mawatesherĂ«m|mawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mawatero|mawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mawateshĂ«|mawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mawateshĂ«m|mawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimawatero|gokimawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimawateshĂ«|gokimawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimawateshĂ«m|gokimawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomawankerom|gomawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomawankeshĂ«|gomawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomawankeshĂ«m|gomawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomawankeya|gomawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mawaterom|mawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mawatemu|mawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mawateya|mawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimawaterom|gokimawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimawatemu|gokimawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimawateya|gokimawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:mawawate|mawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mawawatesher|mawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mawawatesherĂ«m|mawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mawawatero|mawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mawawateshĂ«|mawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mawawateshĂ«m|mawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimawawatero|gokimawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimawawateshĂ«|gokimawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimawawateshĂ«m|gokimawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomawawankerom|gomawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomawawankeshĂ«|gomawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomawawankeshĂ«m|gomawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomawawankeya|gomawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mawawaterom|mawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mawawatemu|mawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mawawateya|mawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimawawaterom|gokimawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimawawatemu|gokimawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimawawateya|gokimawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠwĂŠte|mĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠwĂŠtesher|mĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠwĂŠtero|mĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠwĂŠtero|gokimĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠwĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠwĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠwĂŠterom|mĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠwĂŠtemu|mĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠwĂŠteya|mĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠwĂŠterom|gokimĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠwĂŠteya|gokimĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafwafte|mafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafwaftesher|mafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafwaftesherĂ«m|mafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafwaftero|mafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafwafteshĂ«|mafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafwafteshĂ«m|mafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafwaftero|gokimafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafwafteshĂ«|gokimafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafwafteshĂ«m|gokimafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafwafnkerom|gomafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafwafnkeshĂ«|gomafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafwafnkeshĂ«m|gomafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafwafnkeya|gomafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafwafterom|mafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafwaftemu|mafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafwafteya|mafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafwafterom|gokimafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafwaftemu|gokimafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafwafteya|gokimafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
